title: Past repellent
description:
Well, here it is. The serious project I've been working on for these 3 months. I'm really proud of the result, except for the end where vegas started lagging so much that it needed a lot of time even to pitch shift. Bender is my favorite source so I wanted to make a good YTPMV with it even knowing that it's probably overused or overrated. I wanted also to add sentencing in the middle of it but I couldn't do it since vegas crashed 50-60 times while I was working on it just with the pitch shifting. I hope you enjoy it. Merry Christmas everyone!

Oh yeah, this is round 2 with TheKingOfKings69611
